## Analyzers (1)

### SpamhausDBL `v1.0`
Perform domain lookup to Spamhaus DBL

- **Author:** Wes Lambert
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `domain`, `fqdn`
- **Configuration:** [View config](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/SpamhausDBL/SpamhausDBL.json)
